confirm.title: SensorPush HT1 Found
confirm.description:
Do you want to add **{name}** ({address}) to Home Assistant?

This device broadcasts temperature and humidity passively — no pairing or cloud account required.

abort.already_configured: This SensorPush HT1 is already configured.
abort.not_ht1: This device does not appear to be a SensorPush HT1.
abort.use_bluetooth_discovery: SensorPush HT1 devices are discovered automatically via Bluetooth. Make sure the sensor is powered and in range.

data_description.gatt_poll_interval: How often to connect via Bluetooth to read battery and download history. Default is 30 minutes. Minimum is 5 minutes.
